name: Reply.io

auth.notes: Reply API V3 uses Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_KEY>. Reply MCP setup is based on the user's API key and encrypted HTTPS.

rateLimits: Default per-user quotas are documented as 100 requests per minute and 3,000 requests per hour; 429 responses include Retry-After. Reporting/statistics endpoints may have tighter caps.
notes: Reply is highly agent-ready: official MCP, REST API docs, llms.txt, and a bundled OpenAPI YAML are available.
API V1/V2 are described as outdated and unsupported; prefer V3.
Some MCP commands consume Reply API credits while others do not.
